raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding Citis handling of a credit card dispute for a transaction in the amount of {$1800.00} with Interior Define on XXXX XXXX, 2026. 

This is a clear case of merchandise not received. The merchant failed to produce or deliver the purchased furniture within the originally promised timeframe ( XXXX 2026 ). I was later informed that production had not begun, and delivery was delayed until the end of XXXX 2026. Due to the failure to deliver, I canceled the order. 

The merchant refused to issue a refund to my original form of payment and instead issued store credit without my consent. I never received the merchandise. 

Recently, the merchant issued a partial credit of {$110.00} to my account, leaving {$1600.00} outstanding. This partial refund confirms that the transaction was not fulfilled. 

I disputed the charge with Citi ; however, my dispute was denied. Citi appears to have miscategorized the dispute as a return or cancellation rather than properly treating it as a goods/services not received claim. 

This is not a return dispute. The merchandise was never produced or delivered. 

I am requesting : - That Citi reopen and properly investigate this dispute under the correct classification ( goods/services not received ) - That Citi issue a chargeback or credit for the remaining {$1600.00} Citis refusal to properly process this dispute is inconsistent with credit card network rules and consumer protections. 

I am requesting a full and fair review and resolution of this matter.
